name: Gokaldas Exports Limited
summary: Gokaldas Exports Limited designs, manufactures, and sells a range of garments and related products in India and internationally. Its products include outerwear, active-wear, and fashionwear for men, women, and children. The company serves international fashion brands and retailers. It also exports its products to the United States, Europe, Canada, Japan, Russia, the Middle East, South Africa, and South America. The company was founded in 1979 and is based in Bengaluru, India.
